## aurelian gcp analyze ip-lookup

Looks up an IP address against the GCP published IP ranges to determine whether it belongs to Google Cloud, and if so, which service and region.

```
aurelian gcp analyze ip-lookup [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help        help for ip-lookup
      --ip string   IP address to look up in GCP IP ranges (required)
```
